ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the product (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the product record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp of the product record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "front_rise" REAL /* Measurement of front rise in inches */,
  "back_rise" REAL /* Measurement of back rise in inches */,
  "outseam" REAL /* Total outseam measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Measurement of inseam in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Measurement of chest in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement of waist in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Measurement of hip in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Measurement of sleeve length in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Measurement of shoulder width in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this size in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at this size */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product size is currently discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "order_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., shipped, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for fit (1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for comfort (1-5) */,
  "style_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for style (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product size */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "expected_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product association */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material provided by the supplier for the product */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the material provided by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the chart */,
  "chart_link" TEXT /* Link to the online size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analytics record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales quantity */,
  "total_returns" INTEGER /* Total return quantity */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, inventory specialist) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
